title: Pet Supplements Are Your Highest-Margin Category in 2026 — Here's How to Dominate It
description: The pet supplement market hits $5.11B in 2026 with 40–60% gross margins. Here's exactly how independent pet stores should stock, price, and sell this booming category.

title: Freeze-Dried Raw Pet Food Is Dominating 2026 — Here's How to Turn It Into Your Highest-Margin Category
description: Freeze-dried and air-dried raw formats dominated Global Pet Expo 2026. Here's how to stock, price, and sell this booming $21B category for your highest margins yet.

title: How Smart Pet Stores Are Converting TikTok Scrollers Into Autoship Subscribers in 2026
description: Gen Z and Millennials own 57% of U.S. pets and shop on TikTok, not Google. Here's the social commerce playbook for independent pet stores.

title: 10 Things Every Online Pet Store Owner Should Be Doing Right Now (But Probably Isn't)
description: The $158 billion pet industry is booming — here's how independent online stores can grab their slice without getting crushed by Chewy and Amazon.
